titleZh: 中国发布了新修订的《公司法》
titleEn: China Releases Its Newly Revised Company Law
abstractZh: 梳理新《公司法》十余项主要方向，包括资本缴付规则、治理结构、股东权利、董监高责任与解散等，供外商和内地企业同步落地。
abstractEn: Provides an overview of the key reform areas under the revised Company Law, covering capital, governance, shareholder rights, liability framework, and dissolution-related provisions.
